fields.name: Status
fields.formula: if(totext(field('Approval status')) != 'Approved','',if(today() < field('Start date'), "Scheduled", if(and(today() >field('End date'), field('Progress (workload)') = 100), "Completed", "Active")))

fields.name: Progress (time)
fields.formula:
if(count(field('Tasks')) = 0,0,if(field('Start date') > now(),0,if(field('End date') < now(),100,
round((date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),now()) / date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),field('End date'))) * 100,0))))

fields.name: Status
fields.formula: if(count(field('Tasks')) = 0,'Not started yet',if(field('All tasks completed'),'Completed',if(field('No tasks started'),'Not started yet','In progress')))

fields.name: Progress (time)
fields.formula:
if(count(field('Tasks')) = 0,0,if(field('Start date') > now(),0,if(field('End date') < now(),100,
round((date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),now()) / date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),field('End date'))) * 100,0))))

rows.field_8980: System design and data model approved
Marketing plan and target audience defined

fields.name: Workload difference
fields.formula: if(totext(field('Status')) = 'To do',field('Registered workload'),field('Registered workload') - date_interval(concat(field('Estimated workload'),' hours')))

rows.field_8984: Link customers to orders and tickets

views.name: Add new subtask
views.title: Add a new subtask
views.description: Use this form to start a new subtask related to an existing task assigned to you
views.submit_action_message: The subtask has been added. Set the end time once you completed this task

field_options.description: The task this subtask relates to
Add some optional notes for future follow-up
Set the date and time you started the subtask. This information will be used for workload calculation

rows.field_9003: Identified customers, contacts, deals, incidents and risks
Added key fields for each entity
Prepared final entity list for approval
Defined customer, deal, incident and risk relationships
